claim_text: EU Taxonomy revenue alignment is disclosed with two different scope bases
explanation: EU Taxonomy revenue alignment cited as both 52.0% (Siemens w/o SHS, p.19) and 29.3% (full Siemens, p.19) — different scopes, requires human review

claim_text: Total Scope 1+2 market-based emissions reported in the sustainability statement
explanation: Total Scope 1+2 market-based: PDF p.33 reports 359 ktCO2e, Excel Reconciliation reports 335 ktCO2e

claim_text: Employee commuting emissions reported in the PDF require support from the workbook
explanation: Scope3_categories row 3.7 (Employee Commuting): calculation_method, input_data_source, and emissions_ktCO2e are empty in Excel; PDF p.33 reports 177 ktCO2e

claim_text: Scope 2 market-based total reported in the sustainability statement
explanation: Scope 2 market-based total: PDF p.34 reports 47.0 ktCO2e, Excel Sheet3 sums to 44.8 ktCO2e (~4.7% delta)

claim_text: Cancelled carbon credits require independently verifiable certificate URLs
explanation: carbon_credits_register: Plan Vivo Standard rows have empty certificate_url field; cancellation cannot be independently verified
